steps.title: Set the equations equal
steps.content: Set the right sides equal: $$x+15=5x \;\Rightarrow\; 4x=15 \;\Rightarrow\; x=\tfrac{15}{4}.$$

steps.title: Count the intersection points
steps.content: The lines have different slopes, so they meet at exactly one point. That matches the correct answer — B is correct.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, compare the result from the work to the answer choices. The value, equation, or condition found above is 1, and the other choices fail the same setup or substitution. Therefore B is correct.
